description: Remove deprecated 'legacy_flag' from config. Destructive verb, anchor exists, patch modifies the file containing it. Should pass.
request_text: Remove the 'legacy_flag' setting from the runtime config; it is no longer read by any caller.
diff:
diff --git a/config/runtime.yaml b/config/runtime.yaml
index aaaaaaa..bbbbbbb 100644
--- a/config/runtime.yaml
+++ b/config/runtime.yaml
@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
 timeout: 30
 retries: 3
-legacy_flag: true
 feature_x: enabled
 log_level: info

source_tree_files.config/runtime.yaml:
timeout: 30
retries: 3
legacy_flag: true
feature_x: enabled
log_level: info
